5. app/api/categorize/route.ts - full contents
6. lib/types.ts - full contents

Also search for any file named bank-statement-upload* or containing "bank" in components/ folder and return its contents.

Return the full file contents for each.
</user_query>

input.final_summary: Full contents for all 6 requested files plus 12 bank-related components in `components/` are below. Key bank-reconciliation files: `bank-statement-upload.tsx`, `reconciliation-view.tsx`, and the API routes for transactions, reconcile, and categorize.
